title: seqFISH Tissue Preservation
author: Long Cai
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7e7hjhn

steps.title: Clean surface with RNAzap
steps.instruction: Clean surface with RNAzap. Make the following solutions. 1L PBS 1x, RNAse-free 1.take 1 L RNAse-free water bottle 2.use serologic pipet and draw up 100 mL water into another container 3.add 100 mL of 10x RNase-free PBS 4.mix thoroughly 50% sucrose 1.tare 1 L RNase-free disposable container 2.take 500 g RNAse-free sucrose container 3.add RNAse-free water to sucrose and transfer to 1 L container 4.continue to add RNAse-free water until mass to 1 kg 5.mix thoroughly, may need agitation on platform at RT for some time 6.store at 4⁰C NOTE: for fixation, minimum PFA to tissue volume is 20:1, ideal closer to 50:1

steps.title: Place the tissue in 10% Sucrose...
steps.instruction: Place the tissue in 10% Sucrose at RT and wait for it to sink in 50 mL conical, add 10 mL of sucrose wait for sample to sink to bottom – minimum incubation time of 30 min remove supernatant for next bath.

steps.title: Place the tissue in 30% sucrose...
steps.instruction: Place the tissue in 30% sucrose in 4⁰C – ready for shipping. Make sure there is enough 30% sucrose solution in container e.g. if in 50 mL conicals, have 50 mL of 30% sucrose.

steps.title: Place the tissue in 20% Sucrose...
steps.instruction: Place the tissue in 20% Sucrose at RT and wait for it to sink.

steps.title: Wash three times with equal volume...
steps.instruction: Wash three times with equal volume (30mL) of 1x PBS to remove PFA leave a bit of extra liquid in the bottom between each wash.

steps.title: Prepare 4% PFA in 1x PBS,...
steps.instruction: Prepare 4% PFA in 1x PBS, 120 mL total for 4 tissues 30 mL each in 50 mL conicals. %s %s

steps.title: Place each piece in a 50...
steps.instruction: Place each piece in a 50 ml tube (or smaller if you can cut to smaller pieces) in 4% PFA leave at RT for 3 hrs. ** the sample should be completely covered.

steps.title: Cut freshly dissected tissue to small...
steps.instruction: Cut freshly dissected tissue to small pieces for heart, try cutting slab, 2 cm x 1 cm x 0.4 cm thickness: 2 cm dimension from epicardium to endocardium.
